**Source** [Core Rulebook](/Sources.aspx?ID=1) pg. 74

_You use alchemy for medicinal purposes, healing and protecting others across the lands._

<title level="1" right="Class Sample Build">[Shield Expert](/ClassSamples.aspx?ID=98)</title>

**Source** [Battlecry!](/Sources.aspx?ID=268) pg. 46

_Your shield is like an additional limb—you’re never without it, and you understand how to use it almost instinctively._

<title level="2">Attributes</title>

Strength will help you hit harder when you attack, and Constitution will allow you stay in battle longer. Intelligence will give you better ability to repair your shield between fights.

<title level="2">Skills</title>
